case_title: 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, VS. ARNOLD TODI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABLE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED MAY-09-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TODI, ARNOLD
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TODI, ARNOLD
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $470.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TODI, ARNOLD
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TODI, ARNOLD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TODI, ARNOLD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 45 LANSING STREET, #4001, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TODI, ARNOLD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 271.20 FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TODI, ARNOLD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED THE PREMISES ON JUNE 29, 2016. $8,249.00 RENT, $225.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $470.00 COSTS, $16,272.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,216.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TODI, ARNOLD
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TODI, ARNOLD DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
